title: Enemy
description: A combat adversary type (FR-CBT-02). Static definition only: a live fight's remaining hit points and alert state live in GameState.combat, seeded from this definition when an encounter begins. M1 ships the lone walker; hordes and variety arrive in M2.

$schema.description: Optional editor hint pointing at this schema.

id.description: Stable content id of the form enemy.<slug>.

description.description: How the enemy reads in a combat Scene (ICU MessageFormat string).

maxHp.description: Hit points a fresh encounter with this enemy starts at.

notes.description: Author commentary (JSON has no comments, ADR-0002).
